meta.description: Unstable mountains of compressed scrap metal that loom overhead.
Deep, bubbling pools of fermented apple juice. Far too sticky to walk through.

meta.name: Broken Boiler
meta.description: An old steam boiler that has cold ash spilling out of its furnace.

meta.name: West Pathway
meta.description: A heavy metal door leading back to the Noodle Factory.

meta.name: Suitable Potato
meta.description: A highly prized, perfectly healthy subterranean potato growing in a special plot.

item.name: Suitable Potato
item.description: A rare, non-rotten potato from the Great Farm. It looks almost too perfect.
item.opened_description: The special plot has been harvested.

onUse.successMessage: You harvested a Suitable Potato! It's solid, clean, and highly nutritious.

meta.name: Exit East
meta.description: A heavy metal security gate that creaks open just enough to pass.

meta.name: Noodle Maker NPC
meta.description: A chef wearing a white hat, frantically stirring a pot.

dialogue.text: "The recipe must be exact! No mistakes! Starch is the secret to all life!" Chef Tortellini shouts frantically.

meta.name: Locked Gate
meta.description: A heavy iron gate blocks the way back to Shoeboxlandia. It requires Chapter 2 to open.

conditions.failMessage: The gate is locked tight. The path to Shoeboxlandia will open in Chapter 2.

meta.description: A floor of dried leaves and leather scraps.

meta.name: Dark Corner
meta.description: A very dark corner. You can't see anything here.

item.name: Hidden Message
item.description: A wet note stuck to the wall. It says: 'The path to the desert is guarded by a battery. Bring something shiny.'

meta.description: A soft, springy layer of lint moss.
Soggy, yielding lint-marsh.
The path leads back north toward the forest thicket.

meta.name: Rotten Produce
meta.description: A heap of decaying agricultural waste. It smells strongly of mold.
Oil-stained ground littered with sharp metal shavings.

meta.name: Stash of Freddista
meta.description: A heavy wooden chest. Freddista's stash of stolen items.

item.name: Stolen Pasta
item.description: A box of dried spaghetti. It has Fred's name written on it in marker.
item.opened_description: The chest is open, and all the stolen pasta is gone.

onUse.successMessage: You recovered your stolen pasta! Freddista's crimes are laid bare!

meta.name: Battered Telescope
meta.description: A telescope pointing toward the horizon.
meta.onInteract: You look through the telescope. You see the far-off lands of Textlandia, where words have weight and commas are sharp.

meta.name: Dark Hole
meta.description: A gaping hole in the mountain floor. You can hear echoes from below. Willy warned you not to go in... but the path forward lies through the depths.

meta.name: Noodle Vats
meta.description: Giant boiling vats of starchy broth and noodles.

item.name: Spicy Noodles
item.description: Exotic and very spicy noodles from the factory. Hot enough to melt ice!
item.opened_description: The vats are boiling, but no more spicy noodles can be safely scooped.

onUse.successMessage: You collected some Spicy Noodles! The fiery aroma makes your eyes water!

meta.name: Pneumatic Tube Portal
meta.description: A giant pneumatic transport tube. It seems to lead to a different part of the facility.

meta.name: Jammed Valve
meta.description: A large steam valve that has rusted shut. It refuses to turn.
A piece of bacon lies on the ground, baking in the sun.

item.onCollect: You try a bite... BLERGH! It tastes like concrete! Freddista gives you a disgusted look. "You do know those have been out in the sun and been stepped on right?"

meta.name: Lost Lens
meta.description: A small metallic compartment buried under a heap of broken gears.

item.name: Magnifying Lens
item.description: A highly polished glass lens that focuses ambient light. Perfect for studying tiny details.

onUse.successMessage: You found a Magnifying Lens! Combined with a frame, it might make a useful tool.

meta.name: Metal Heap
meta.description: A pile of discarded brass and iron scraps.

item.name: Sturdy Brass Frame
item.description: A heavy frame crafted from antique brass. It has a circular opening in the center.

onUse.successMessage: You salvaged a Sturdy Brass Frame! It looks like a handle or support of some kind.

meta.name: Compact Crusher
meta.description: A slow-moving piston that periodically crushes heaps of junk.
The floor of the cave glows with a soft, bioluminescent light.
A single, incredibly strong shoelace vine hangs from the ceiling.

item.onCollect: Your scream vibrates the vine, causing it to snap and fall into your hands!

meta.description: The smooth, dusty wood of the shelf.

meta.name: Lexicon Sphere
meta.description: A glowing sphere constructed of pure alphabetic characters. It hums with the rules of spelling and grammar.
